checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Current LC route smoke output, browser QA report, and rollback deployment id
acceptanceCriteria: Root, booking, auth, blog, team, LCFC, apply, terms, privacy, and admin routes still respond.
LC Training header/footer/navigation remain intact outside Detroit Dynamo routes.
A rollback deployment id or previous production build target is recorded before promotion.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not replace the root route until the current-site snapshot and rollback target are saved.

relatedCutoverTracks.label: Current LC site snapshot and rollback
Root route and public shell promotion

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Backend preflight report plus Appwrite provision/apply transcript for isolated dd_* collections
acceptanceCriteria: Preflight passes without printing secrets.
All Detroit Dynamo dd_* collections, attributes, indexes, and permissions exist in the target Appwrite project.
Legacy LC Training collections are not mutated by the Dynamo provisioner.
checklistItems.verificationCommand: npm run preflight:dynamo-backend && npm run provision:dynamo-appwrite -- --apply
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Keep public forms in local preview/fallback mode until Appwrite schema provisioning is verified.

relatedCutoverTracks.label: Backend intake and admin data cutover

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Production-preview submission ids for every public form variant and authenticated admin action
acceptanceCriteria: Lead intake, pipeline action, module read, role grant, and module write functions are deployed with expected scopes.
Training, tryout, youth, senior men, senior women, sponsor, and contact forms create expected records.
Authenticated admin actions write audit events and reject unauthorized users.
checklistItems.verificationCommand: npm run verify:dynamo-intake-contract && npm run verify:dynamo-pipeline-actions
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not make Appwrite the default intake mode until production-preview submissions and admin actions pass.

relatedCutoverTracks.label: Backend intake and admin data cutover

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Approved package matrix with prices, session counts, taxes/fees, refund rules, and provider product ids
acceptanceCriteria: Private, small-group, team-training, camp, tryout, youth dues, and sponsor packages are approved.
Provider product ids or invoice workflow ids are mapped to TrainingPackage, Payment, Booking, CampClinic, and Sponsor records.
Refund, cancellation, failed-payment, and settlement handling are documented.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not publish checkout links or exact package commitments before owner approval.

relatedCutoverTracks.label: Booking, payment, package, and waiver cutover

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Successful sandbox payment, failure, refund/cancel, and webhook/audit test evidence
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout succeeds for approved training, camp, dues, and sponsor payment paths.
Failed, canceled, and refunded payments map cleanly to Payment records.
No public Dynamo payment surface is enabled without the approved package matrix.
checklistItems.verificationCommand: Provider sandbox test plus npm run verify:dynamo-gate-contracts
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Keep payment CTAs as inquiry-only until provider sandbox evidence is signed off.

relatedCutoverTracks.label: Booking, payment, package, and waiver cutover

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Approved waiver/legal version register for youth, adult, medical, media, camp, and travel consent
acceptanceCriteria: Each waiver has approved language, version id, effective date, expiration rule, and owner/legal signoff.
Minor participation requires guardian signature coverage and data-retention rules.
Waiver requirements are mapped to tryouts, camps, training bookings, teams, and roster eligibility.
checklistItems.verificationCommand: npm run verify:dynamo-gate-contracts && npm run verify:dynamo-safeguarding
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not collect signatures, medical consent, or final legal acknowledgements until waiver versions are approved.

relatedCutoverTracks.label: Booking, payment, package, and waiver cutover

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Guardian/adult signature workflow test with audit trail, export, expiration, and revocation handling
acceptanceCriteria: Guardian and adult signature paths are tested on mobile and desktop.
Signed waiver records retain version, signer, timestamp, related player/program, and audit evidence.
Expired, revoked, or missing waivers block the correct admin workflows.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not open youth registration, camp registration, or senior evaluations until signature workflow evidence exists.

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Official league, competition, fixture, roster, and staff confirmation documents or owner-approved public wording
acceptanceCriteria: No current UPSL, UPSL Women, youth league, roster, fixture, or result claim is published without confirmation.
Future-pathway language remains in place for unconfirmed leagues and teams.
Fixture, opponent, venue, competition, roster, and staff claims are individually approved before publication.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not publish current league membership, fixtures, results, rosters, or staff claims without proof.

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Facility permits/agreements, schedule windows, emergency procedures, insurance notes, and location publish approval
acceptanceCriteria: Training, tryout, camp, indoor, match, and youth-team locations are confirmed before publication.
Facility partner permissions, check-in instructions, weather/cancel rules, and emergency procedures are documented.
Address, parking, access, and schedule copy is approved before going public.
checklistItems.verificationCommand: npm run verify:dynamo-claim-safety && npm run verify:dynamo-safeguarding
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not publish facility commitments, addresses, or schedules until operating access is confirmed.

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Staff approval, background/safeguarding status, roster publication approvals, and media-release coverage
acceptanceCriteria: Staff and coach profiles are approved before publication.
Youth player roster visibility follows guardian consent, media release, and safeguarding policy.
Team manager and coach access is scoped to assigned teams and verified through role grants.
checklistItems.verificationCommand: npm run verify:dynamo-safeguarding && npm run verify:dynamo-admin-role-grants
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not publish youth roster/staff proof or enable sensitive roster workflows before safeguarding evidence exists.

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Sponsor logo permissions, testimonial approvals, media releases, news proof, and publishing calendar
acceptanceCriteria: Sponsor logos, testimonials, photos, video, and outcome claims have permission before publication.
News/media proof is tied to approved source material.
Sponsor package activation promises match approved sponsorship inventory.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not publish sponsor, testimonial, media, or player-outcome proof without permission.

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Approved titles, descriptions, favicon, Open Graph asset, robots, sitemap, canonical URLs, and noindex removal approval
acceptanceCriteria: Detroit Dynamo metadata and social assets are approved for the public root brand.
Noindex removal is owner-approved and tied to the approved launch window.
Current LC Training root SEO is not overwritten before promotion approval.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not remove preview-only noindex or replace root metadata until SEO launch approval is recorded.

checklistItems.requiredArtifact: Approved redirect plan, auth/payment/admin exclusions, post-cutover route QA, and rollback instructions
acceptanceCriteria: Old LC routes, auth routes, admin routes, and payment callbacks have explicit redirect/exclusion decisions.
Post-cutover browser QA passes on desktop and mobile.
Rollback instructions are documented before permanent redirects are applied.
checklistItems.liveActionBlocked: Do not apply permanent redirects until redirect QA and rollback evidence are approved.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Root LC routes, booking, auth, forms, navigation, manifest, and footer continue to work before launch.
promotionGates.nextAction: Keep running current-site isolation checks before every promotion decision.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: All required dd_* collections exist, permissions are reviewed, and public forms persist to Appwrite.
promotionGates.nextAction: Provision after final field review and valid credentials are available.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Products, packages, taxes/fees, refunds, and settlement handling are approved by the business owner.
promotionGates.nextAction: Map approved packages to checkout flows and payment records.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Participation, medical, media, privacy, and travel consent language is approved before signature capture.
promotionGates.nextAction: Connect waiver versions to registrations, bookings, camps, and teams.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: No current league, fixture, roster, facility, or staff claim is published without confirmation.
promotionGates.nextAction: Maintain future-pathway language until official documents or owner-approved facts are available.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Canonical routes, sitemap, metadata, Open Graph assets, and old-route redirect timing are approved.
promotionGates.nextAction: Remove noindex only when Detroit Dynamo is the approved public brand.

requiredFacts: Approved private, small-group, team-training, camp, tryout, dues, and sponsor package pricing
Selected payment provider, checkout flow, refund policy, and failed-payment handling
Tax/fee treatment, discount policy, and settlement ownership
Admin reporting needs for packages, payments, refunds, and outstanding balances
externalConfirmationRegister.publishRule: Do not publish checkout links or exact package commitments until pricing and provider setup are approved.
externalConfirmationRegister.nextAction: Owner approves package matrix, provider, refund rules, and admin payment fields.

requiredFacts: Youth participation waiver and medical consent language
Media release, privacy/terms language, and adult participation waiver
Travel, emergency contact, and camp/clinic consent requirements
Versioning, expiration, guardian signature, and retention rules
externalConfirmationRegister.publishRule: Do not collect signatures or present legal text as final until owner/legal review is complete.
externalConfirmationRegister.nextAction: Prepare approved waiver versions and map each form/program to the right waiver requirement.

requiredFacts: Confirmed senior men league acceptance before naming current UPSL or similar membership
Confirmed senior women league acceptance before naming current UPSL Women or similar membership
Confirmed youth league placement before naming current youth competition
Fixture, opponent, venue, roster, staff, and competition rules confirmed before publication
externalConfirmationRegister.publishRule: Use future-pathway language until written league or competition confirmation exists.
externalConfirmationRegister.nextAction: Collect official league/competition documentation and owner-approved public wording.

requiredFacts: Confirmed training locations, field permits, indoor facility access, and match venues
Calendar availability for private training, camps, tryouts, youth teams, and senior teams
Insurance, safety, weather, cancellation, check-in, and emergency procedures
Published location names, addresses, parking/access notes, and facility partner permissions
externalConfirmationRegister.publishRule: Do not publish facility commitments, addresses, or schedules until operating access is confirmed.
externalConfirmationRegister.nextAction: Confirm facility partners, operating rules, insurance requirements, and calendar windows.

requiredFacts: Confirmed staff names, roles, bios, licenses, photos, and public contact rules
Background check, safeguarding, and youth communication standards
Approved rosters, player photos, bios, statuses, and parent/player release permissions
Team manager assignments and internal access levels
externalConfirmationRegister.publishRule: Do not publish staff, roster, or player bio details until permissions and verification are complete.
externalConfirmationRegister.nextAction: Collect staff/roster approvals and map internal roles to admin permissions.

requiredFacts: Approved sponsor packages, logos, website links, activation inventory, and display permissions
Real testimonials, player stories, media clips, and partner quotes
Launch announcements, news categories, editorial approval workflow, and image rights
SEO/social assets, redirect timing, sitemap/robots publication, and current-site migration wording
externalConfirmationRegister.publishRule: Keep proof slots as placeholders until real quotes, sponsor assets, and content rights are approved.
externalConfirmationRegister.nextAction: Approve sponsor assets, proof content, launch copy, and publication workflow before promotion.

backendActivationSteps.title: Run Local Backend Preflight
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Backend preflight report shows schema, function config, function source, pipeline-action fixture coverage, admin-module-read fixture coverage, admin-role-grant fixture coverage, admin-module-write fixture coverage, and env-key presence without printing secrets.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Resolve any failing local checks before attempting networked backend work.

backendActivationSteps.title: Review Appwrite Collection Plan
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Plan confirms the 18 requested operational dd_* collections plus admin audit event and admin role assignment collections with expected attributes, indexes, access policies, and public/function write paths.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Approve fields, indexes, owner roles, public-form destinations, and audit-event retention before applying.

backendActivationSteps.title: Provision Isolated Collections
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Appwrite contains the dd_* collections, attributes, indexes, and permissions required by the Detroit Dynamo model.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Use valid Appwrite credentials and do not mutate legacy LC Training collections.

backendActivationSteps.title: Configure Function Variables
backendActivationSteps.evidence: detroitDynamoLeadIntake, detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction, detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead, detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction, and detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction have APPWRITE_API_KEY configured in Appwrite without exposing the key in logs or client code.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Confirm function variables after replacing any expired Appwrite key; set DETROIT_DYNAMO_BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_USER_ID before first live Master Admin grant.

backendActivationSteps.title: Deploy Lead Intake, Pipeline, Module Read, Role Grant, and Module Write Functions
backendActivationSteps.evidence: detroitDynamoLeadIntake, detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction, detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead, detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction, and detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction are deployed and enabled with database/document scopes from appwrite.json.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Deploy only after preflight, provisioning, and function variable configuration pass.

backendActivationSteps.title: Enable Appwrite Intake in Admin
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Protected admin mode is switched from Local Preview to Appwrite Intake after backend deployment.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Keep local preview fallback available until production-preview form submissions are verified.

backendActivationSteps.title: Submit Production-Preview Test Leads and Pipeline Actions
backendActivationSteps.command: npm run verify:dynamo-intake-contract && npm run verify:dynamo-pipeline-actions, then submit training, tryout, youth, senior, sponsor, and contact forms from /detroit-dynamo/*
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Pipeline action fixtures validate locally, test submissions create ContactLead plus expected TryoutRegistration or Sponsor records in the dd_* collections, and authenticated pipeline actions update allowed statuses.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Verify no console errors, no broken success states, valid status transitions, and clear admin routing for every lead type.

backendActivationSteps.title: Lock Promotion Gate Evidence
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Goal audit still passes implemented scope and keeps external gates visible until payments, waivers, facilities, and league facts are confirmed.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Do not remove preview-only noindex or redirect the current LC site until all promotion gates are approved.
